equivalence_argument: No complete mapping was found: the audited block executor does not extract pending SPC calls from async context and inject them into stored recovered Legacy/EIP-1559 transactions.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing async-context-gated extraction and injection of pending SPC calls into executed recovered transactions in the block executor storage path.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/evm/evm/src/execute.rs contains generic executor traits and no async-context SPC-call injection path.

payload code reuses existing spc_calls during async replay and annotates settlement/original transactions in later paths, but it is not the generic post-execution recovered-transaction storage behavior described by this invariant.
alloy transaction types expose spc_calls fields, but the audited port lacks the execute.rs injection helper named by the evidence file.

rationale: The primary commit replaces unconditional transaction storage with async-context-gated extraction of pending SPC calls, calls injection helpers before pushing the recovered transaction, and adds helpers that append or initialize spc_calls on Legacy and EIP-1559 transactions. The commit subject explicitly frames this as SPC call injection for verification mode. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: When async-context is enabled and a transaction execution leaves pending SPC calls in async context, the recovered transaction stored by the block executor should include those SPC calls for supported Legacy and EIP-1559 transaction types; if injection cannot be performed, execution should still store the original recovered transaction instead of dropping the transaction.
suggested_falsification_tests: With the async-context feature enabled, execute a block containing a Legacy or EIP-1559 transaction that causes the async context to record two pending SPC calls, then inspect the executor's stored recovered transaction and assert its spc_calls field contains both calls; also execute an unsupported transaction type and assert the original transaction is still pushed without failing block execution.
summary: Executed-transaction SPC call injection is absent from the audited executor path.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Execute a Legacy/EIP-1559 transaction that records pending SPC calls in async context and inspect the block executor stored transaction; current execute.rs has no injection path to populate spc_calls.
title: Executed transactions persist pending SPC calls
